case_title: ZHEN MAY SZETO VS. DANY ZELIS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-19-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ZELIS, DANY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $975.24 FILED BY SZETO, ZHEN MAY AS TO DEFENDANT ZELIS, DANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-01-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SZETO, ZHEN MAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZELIS, DANY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
